name: dev.ucp.shopping.discount
title: Discount Extension
description: Extends Cart and Checkout with discount support, including discount codes, automatic discounts, and eligibility-triggered provisional discounts.

allocation.description: Breakdown of how a discount amount was allocated to a specific target.

amount.description: Amount allocated to this target in ISO 4217 minor units.

applied_discount.description: A discount that was successfully applied.

code.description: The discount code. Omitted for automatic discounts.

amount.description: Total discount amount in ISO 4217 minor units.

automatic.description: True if applied automatically by merchant rules (no code required).

method.description: Allocation method. 'each' = applied independently per item. 'across' = split proportionally by value.

priority.description: Stacking order for discount calculation. Lower numbers applied first (1 = first).

provisional.description: True if this discount requires additional verification.

eligibility.description: The eligibility claim accepted by the Business for this discount. Corresponds to a value from context.eligibility. Omitted for code-based and non-eligibility automatic discounts.

allocations.description: Breakdown of where this discount was allocated. Sum of allocation amounts equals total amount.

available_discount.description: A discount available for discovery in the current context.

type.description: 'automatic' — business applies when conditions are met, no code needed. 'code' — buyer must submit a code (the code itself is NOT exposed).

conditions.description: Human-readable summary of conditions to qualify (e.g., 'Orders over $50').

applied.description: Whether this discount is already applied to the current cart/checkout.

remaining_amount.description: How much more the buyer needs to spend to qualify, in ISO 4217 minor units. Useful for 'add $12 more for free shipping' prompts.

discounts_object.description: Discount codes input and applied discounts output.

codes.description: Discount codes to apply. Case-insensitive. Replaces previously submitted codes. Send empty array to clear.

available.description: Discounts available for this cart or checkout context. Business-optional. Includes both automatic promotions and discoverable code-based offers.
